businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader, built on three pillars: Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and enterprise organizations. FY2025 revenue hit $4.48B (+56% YoY) with 32% adjusted operating margin. Closed Friday at $150.95 (-1.66%). Death cross has formed but RSI at 53 is not oversold. AIPCon 9 unveiled major partnerships with GE Aerospace, Polymarket, and a sovereign AI data center architecture co-developed with NVIDIA.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts (Gotham: defense and intelligence data analytics)
Enterprise AI platform (Foundry: industrial data analytics)
AIP Bootcamps (5-day intensive pilots that scale to enterprise-wide deployments)
keyProducts: Gotham: Mission-critical analytics for defense and intelligence agencies
Foundry: Enterprise data integration and analytics
Sovereign AI Data Centers: Co-architecture with NVIDIA

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high valuation reflecting peak AI premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS estimate of $1.34. Still the highest in the sector

keyMetrics.name: Debt-to-Equity (D/E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Virtually debt-free with $7.18B cash on hand

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. MACD turning bullish suggests potential rebound

growthDrivers.title: Sovereign AI Data Center Architecture with NVIDIA
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/14): Palantir and NVIDIA jointly announced a turnkey sovereign AI data center architecture. Addresses global government demand for domestic AI infrastructure. A catalyst for expanding defense and government AI markets.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 Mission-Critical Partnerships (3/12)
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): Multi-year contracts with GE Aerospace (military aviation maintenance), Centrus Energy (nuclear AI), Ondas (drone ISR), World View (stratospheric ISR), and LG CNS. Expanding AI applications across defense, energy, manufacturing, and prediction markets.

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket Sports Betting Integrity Platform: New TAM
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/13): Co-developing Vergence AI sports integrity platform with Polymarket and TWG AI. A novel application of prediction markets combined with AI analytics.

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61%): Record Growth Outlook
growthDrivers.description: Tickeron: FY2026 revenue guidance of $7.18-7.20B, +61% YoY growth. Significantly exceeds prior consensus. AIP bootcamp strategy is accelerating commercial revenue conversion.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ year track record in government and defense AI. Security clearance requirements create high barriers to entry. NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership extends reach to global government markets. Ontology platform provides a unique competitive moat.

moats.description: Holds top-tier U.S. Department of Defense and intelligence agency clearances. Competitors cannot easily replicate.
Turnkey sovereign data center architecture for global government AI market penetration.
5-day intensive pilots that convert enterprise prospects into full-scale deployments at high conversion rates.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform with a general-purpose approach vs. Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse expanding into analytics platform territory

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI, but trails Palantir in scale and track record

recentNews.headline: BNP Paribas Boosts Palantir Holdings by 17.6%, Institutional Buying Continues
recentNews.significance: BNP Paribas expanded position to 48,512 shares. Multiple institutions increased stakes in Q3, signaling long-term growth confidence

recentNews.headline: Palantir-NVIDIA Unveil Turnkey Sovereign AI Data Center Architecture
recentNews.significance: Addresses global government demand for domestic AI infrastructure. Significantly expands government AI TAM

recentNews.headline: Iran's IRGC Lists Palantir as Potential Military Technology Target
recentNews.significance: Highlights growing influence as defense AI leader, while introducing new geopolitical risk factor

recentNews.headline: LG CNS Expands Strategic Partnership for Enterprise-Wide AI Transformation Across LG Group
recentNews.significance: Scaling from 2025 pilot deployment to full LG Group. AI applications in manufacturing, energy, electronics, logistics. Accelerates Asia market entry

recentNews.headline: AIPCon 9: Partnership with Ondas and World View for Next-Gen Multi-Domain Intelligence Platform
recentNews.significance: Entering new defense AI domains including drone ISR and stratospheric reconnaissance. Expands government contract pipeline

analystOpinions.notableComment: 16 out of 28 analysts rate Buy. Barchart consensus $200.41 (+33%). Rosenblatt raised to $200 Strong Buy (3/3), UBS upgraded to Buy at $180 (2/26). Two Sell ratings with $50 low target citing valuation concerns.

risks.title: Death Cross Formed: Bearish Technical Signal
risks.description: 50-day SMA ($153.85) crossed below 200-day SMA ($162.81). Similar pattern in October 2021 preceded a -60% decline. Short-term further downside possible.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation: P/E 241x, P/S 81x
risks.description: A $4.48B revenue company valued at $361B market cap. Any growth deceleration could trigger sharp multiple compression.

risks.title: Iran IRGC Targeting: Geopolitical Risk
risks.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard listed Palantir as a potential military technology target. Highlights the geopolitical risks of being a defense AI leader.

risks.title: Share Dilution: +4.67% YoY
risks.description: Stock-based compensation causes nearly 5% annual dilution, eroding long-term shareholder value.

risks.title: Big Tech AI Platform Competition
risks.description: Microsoft, Google, and Amazon are aggressively expanding their AI platforms into the enterprise market. Could slow commercial revenue growth.

buyReasons.title: NVIDIA Sovereign AI Partnership Expands Government TAM
buyReasons.rationale: Turnkey sovereign data centers target global government AI markets. Unique positioning within the NVIDIA ecosystem.

buyReasons.title: FY2026 Guidance $7.2B (+61%): Record Growth Rate
buyReasons.rationale: Guidance significantly exceeds prior consensus. AIP commercial revenue conversion is accelerating, reinforcing growth conviction.

buyReasons.title: Institutional Buying Momentum
buyReasons.rationale: BNP Paribas increased holdings by 17.6%, with multiple institutions expanding stakes. Institutional investors are betting on long-term growth despite valuation concerns.

buyReasons.title: 47% FCF Margin + Virtually Debt-Free
buyReasons.rationale: $7.18B cash, only $229M debt. 47% FCF margin provides ample self-funded growth capacity.

overallOpinion: Iran's IRGC listed Palantir as a potential military technology target. The flip side of being a defense AI leader is that geopolitical risk comes with the territory.

Institutional investors are buying into the dip. BNP Paribas increased holdings by 17.6%, and multiple funds expanded their positions in Q3. Institutions are betting on +61% guidance over short-term volatility.
The death cross flashes bearish, but MACD is turning bullish, sending mixed technical signals. The LG CNS partnership expansion is opening up the Asian market.
Closed at $150.95, below both the 50-day ($153.85) and 200-day ($162.81) SMAs. But 26 analysts average a $200 target, implying 33% upside.

investmentVerdict.summary: Iran risk and the death cross create short-term headwinds, but FY2026 +61% guidance, NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership, and growing institutional buying support the long-term thesis. Dollar-cost averaging recommended given the 241x P/E valuation.

threads.hook: Iran targets Palantir while institutions keep buying
threads.text:
$PLTR (Mar 16) $150.95 (-1.66%)

Iran's IRGC listed Palantir as a potential military technology target. When you're the leading defense AI company, geopolitical risk comes with the job.

But institutions aren't flinching. BNP Paribas added 17.6% more shares. Multiple funds expanded positions in Q3. They see +61% revenue growth, not headlines.

Death cross vs bullish MACD. LG CNS partnership scaling across Asia. 26 analysts average $200 target (+33%). The long-term story is intact.

witty.hook: Iran wants to fight Palantir, BNP Paribas wants to buy more
witty.text:
$PLTR (Mar 16) $150.95 (-1.66%)

Iran put Palantir on its hit list. BNP Paribas put it on its buy list. Both can't be right, but here we are.

Death cross says doom. MACD says bloom. The charts are having an identity crisis. Meanwhile, LG CNS is scaling Palantir AI across Korea.

P/E 241x is either delusional or visionary. +61% growth makes it hard to dismiss. 26 analysts think $200 (+33%). The argument isn't over.

empathy.hook: Holding PLTR right now takes some nerve
empathy.text:
$PLTR (Mar 16) $150.95 (-1.66%)

Iran targeting, death cross, 241x P/E. If you're a PLTR holder, this week was not easy on the nerves.

But here's what the institutions are seeing: BNP Paribas added 17.6%. LG CNS expanding the partnership across Asia. MACD turning up. The bad headlines are real, but so is the +61% growth.

26 analysts average $200 target (+33%). If you're uncomfortable, dollar-cost averaging takes the pressure off. May earnings is the next big moment.
